headline: I started FarmThru because my kids deserved better than supermarket meat.
subhead: We deliver regenerative beef, chicken, and salmon straight from the farm to your kitchen. Days old, not weeks.
hero_copy: A letter from the founder of FarmThru.

sections.heading: Why I built FarmThru.
sections.body: I used to buy everything from Woolworths. Then I started asking: why does this chicken taste like nothing? Why is this beef grey after two days? What I found was a broken system. Farmers get squeezed on price. Produce sits in cold storage for weeks. By the time it hits your fridge, the flavour and nutrition are gone.

sections.heading: We believe
sections.body: "We believe everyone deserves access to food they can trust. Not just people who can afford farmers' markets on Saturday mornings."

sections.heading: Farm to kitchen in three steps.
sections.body: Browse 50+ farm partners. We pack fresh from Brookvale. Delivered to your door. Delivering across Sydney, Central Coast, and Wollongong. 100% Regenerative. Pasture-Raised. No Middlemen.

sections.heading: I put everything into building this. All I'm asking for is your email.
sections.body: Join the waitlist. You'll be first to know when FarmThru opens investment to the public. No commitment. Free to join. Not financial advice. A disclosure document will be available on Birchal.

sections.heading: Get first access to invest.
sections.body: Place a refundable $5 deposit to secure VIP status. Fully refundable at any time.

creative_brief: Dark hero background, founder voice. Certification badges (Regenerative, Pasture-Raised, No Middlemen).
